message:
Refactor Redis Transaction error paths with discard_connection helper

Extract repeated conn.discard() + self.finished = true + self.conn = None
pattern into a discard_connection() method, reducing error-path
duplication in cmd_bytes() and exec(). Remove #[derive(Debug)] from
Transaction since PooledResource<RedisConnection> may not impl Debug.
Use self.conn_mut()? inline for write_command/read_response calls
instead of binding a long-lived mutable reference, satisfying the
borrow checker without unsafe.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
